theme_archetype: Warm Authority (Custom based on Archetype 1 & 4) - Light Theme with bold red accents

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter text-text_dark font-black
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight text-text_dark font-bold

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary_dark text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-primary hover:bg-surface_secondary rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-300 group
cards.highlighted: bg-primary text-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg relative overflow-hidden

components.inputs: bg-surface_secondary border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 w-full transition-all text-text_dark

global_nav.style: Glassmorphism over hero (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-border/50), solid white on scroll. Include Logo left, Links center, CTA right.

home.hero: Split layout. Left: H1 with rich text hierarchy, CTA 'Book Free Consultation'. Right/Background: Abstract coral image ('hero_background'). Or use university image with heavy red overlay (bg-primary/90).
home.metrics: Bento grid for '85% success, 30+ countries, 2 alumni stories'. Use solid red blocks (#ec5c53) with bold white text for key stats.
home.services_overview: Teaser cards for top services with subtle hover lifts.

services.layout: Grid of plan cards. PS/SOP ₹999, SP ₹799, Both ₹1499, Guidance ₹399.
services.plan_cards: Use 'cards.highlighted' for the most popular plan, 'cards.default' for others. Prominent pricing, bullet points, CTA 'Book Slot'.
services.booking_form: Shadcn-styled form (package select, name, email, mobile). Clean, spacious fields.

scholarships.layout: Sidebar filter (degree level, country) + Main grid of results.
scholarships.cards: Include flag emojis, country name, scholarship title, deadline, and 'Apply Now' button.
scholarships.apply_form: Multi-step or long clear form for scholarship application.

apostille.layout: Timeline/Stepped process. 5 stages using vertical connector lines.
apostille.visuals: Use 'apostille_hero' image for header. High-end, official feel.
apostille.order_form: Clear segmented form for document pickup and processing.

notice.layout: Vertical timeline/calendar for updates. Dates prominent on the left, details on the right.

contact.layout: Split layout. Left: Contact info, WhatsApp quick-chat buttons (green or solid dark red). Right: Standard contact form.

admin_dashboard.theme: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) for clarity. High legibility, dense data.
admin_dashboard.sidebar: Dark red (#e0523e) or pure white with red accents. Tabs: Bookings, Applications, Orders, Messages.
admin_dashboard.tables: Shadcn tables with clear status badges (Pending, Approved, Processed). Export CSV button top right.

global_rules.accessibility: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Use descriptive aria-labels.
global_rules.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for elegance.
global_rules.transitions: Use Framer Motion for page transitions and staggering list elements.
global_rules.hover_states: Every button and link must have a defined hover state (e.g., hover:text-primary_dark or hover:-translate-y-1).
global_rules.tailwind_config: Ensure the main agent extends Tailwind config with the brand_colors as primary, primary_dark, etc. Add the font-families Cabinet Grotesk (heading) and Work Sans (body) to the config.
